title: JuggleGamingPack
description: This Modpack is designed to improve performance and add some features like dynamic lighting. In addition, the included resource packs should help to improve the gaming experience (e.g. through lower fire/lower shield/redstone adjustments).
body:
The **JuggleGamingPack** was developed to <ins>improve your gaming experience and add a number of features</ins>.

<details>
<summary>💡 Features</summary>

- dynamic light
- minimap
- ping system
- roughly enought items
- voice chat
- worldedit
+ some resourcepacks (incl.: lower fire/shield, redstone status etc.)

</details>



There are some <ins>QoL-features</ins> included to make the gaming experience even better.

<details>
<summary>🛠️ QoL-features</summary>

- better command block ui
- glowing ores
- NBT-autocomplete
- zoom


</details>


With all these additions to the normal game, not only the performance but also the fun of the game should be increased.
